title: alyssum calycocarpum
intro: Alyssum calycocarpum, also known as beach heliotrope or desert heliotrope, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alyssum calycocarpum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant effects. It can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tinctures, and also used as a topical cream or salve for skin issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness in human health.
